title: coronilla serradella
intro: Coronilla serradella, also known as grey clover or mountain clover, is a flowering plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Its medicinal properties also provide health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. Coronilla serradella can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
